On Friday the 26th of June, Mr Kalu Aja posted the above map in an X post where he argued about Federation Account Allocation Committee being totally unnecessary in Nigeria.
I saw the above map and did my own digging. By Monday the 29th, I had created this map. This post is a tutorial on how you can create your own interactive of Nigeria showing the mineral resources of the states in the country. However, the concepts can be used for any country of your choice.
This tutorial assumes a basic understanding of HTML, CSS and JavaScript.
The reason for creating this map was to make something that is beautiful, interactive and simple. I found the above map too cluttered.
Step 1: Obtain an SVG Map of Nigeria
I decided against using Google Maps or any other external services so the map would have to be a Scalable Vector Graphics (SVG).
Scalable Vector Graphics (SVG) is an XML-based vector image format for two-dimensional graphics with support for interactivity and animation.
SVG files use mathematical formulas to create graphics, allowing infinite scaling without losing quality, and making them perfect for high…
